{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = False King
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[False King]] is an enemy of the [[Karoshan]] cause.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
